name: Macmahon Holdings Limited
analysis: MAH has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$0.9040. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$0.9140 where 3 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$0.9040, stop A$0.8217, target A$0.9400. Risk/reward is 0.44:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
